description: Composition Washed dark blue denim skirt made of 99% cotton and 1% spandex, has a waistband with belt loops, a button and zipper closure, two insert pockets on the front, one smaller pocket on the right thigh, two patch pockets at the back with stitch detail and brand patch on the waistband at the back Fit Slim Wash care Machine or hand wash in cold water at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Flat dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations If you're a denim person, these jeggings from jealous 21 are perfect for you. Designed to contour the hips and fit the waist to perfection, the label gets it right every time - you might not want to take these off once you pull them on! It'll go perfectly with your t-shirts and dressy tops, style this tastefully with in-season accessories and heels. Model statistics The product is a size 28 on a model of height 5'8” and waist 28"
